# `nise backends`

- **Usage**: `nise backends <SUBCOMMAND>`
- **Source code**: [`src/cli/backends/mod.rs`](https://github.com/jdx/mise/blob/main/src/cli/backends/mod.rs)

Manage backends

## Subcommands

- [`nise backends ls`](/cli/backends/ls.md)

Deprecation:

The `nise b` alias is deprecated and will be removed in nise 2027.4.0.
Use `nise backends` instead.
